stemHtml:
To achieve a CG position of 17.7 meters aft of the datum for optimal take-off performance, determine the amount of mass that needs to be shifted between the cargo holds based on the following details.

Forward Cargo Hold centroid: 3.6 m aft of the datum
Aft Cargo Hold centroid: 29.8 m aft of the datum
Current CG position: 18.4 m aft of the datum
Actual Take-Off Mass: 60 655 kg

Consider the Fuel consumption from engine start to take off as negligible. Disregard cargo hold floor loading limits.

options.a: 3307 kg to be moved from aft to forward.
options.b: 1621 kg to be moved from forward to aft.
options.c: 3307 kg to be moved from forward to aft.
options.d: 1621 kg to be moved from aft to forward.
